done_payload.summary: I have successfully implemented Phase 2 of the tinylang interpreter benchmark by creating a recursive descent parser that converts tokens into an Abstract Syntax Tree (AST). The implementation includes a complete AST module (`tinylang/ast.py`) with all required node dataclasses and a parser module (`tinylang/parser.py`) that handles the full grammar including all statement forms, expression precedence levels, and literal types. The parser correctly supports both string and token list inputs, handles all required AST node names, and properly implements precedence and associativity rules. It correctly parses complex structures like nested if-else chains, function declarations, control flow statements, and assignment expressions with proper target validation. The implementation is complete and ready for the next phase of the benchmark.
